# IP-006: Sanitized in callee — vulnerable (callee doesn't sanitize)
lang: go
file: IP-006-vulnerable.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
    "net/http"
    "os"
)

func caller() {
    x := r.URL.Query().Get("input")
    tainted := callee(x)
    os.Open(tainted)
}

func callee(s string) string {
    return s
}
